markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[GrowthX demo for Tines to evaluate a content partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Tines's Goal:** Shift content from practitioner-focused to C-level to support its new "Intelligent Workflow Platform" positioning, moving beyond its security automation roots.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** An agentic AI platform that uses deep persona context and a multi-step fact-checking process to produce high-quality content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Tines's Assessment:** The solution is a strong fit, with Mark Hatton noting the \~$1,000/post cost is competitive with freelancers but offers far greater velocity and expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Tines is targeting a late Q1 2026 kickoff, as internal projects and a March company kickoff limit team capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)

## Topics

### Tines's Content Strategy & Challenges

  - [**New Positioning:** Evolving from a SOAR (Security Orchestration, Automation, Response) platform to a broader "Intelligent Workflow Platform" for IT and other functions.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [**Core Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [Secure, enterprise-grade platform (vs. Zapier, N8N).](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
      - [Supports agentic, deterministic, and human-in-the-loop workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [**Target Audience:**](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Executive Buyers:** CISOs, CIOs, CTOs.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Practitioners:** Security Engineers/Managers, IT Managers.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Content Gap:** Current content is practitioner-heavy; the goal is to create more C-level thought leadership to support the new positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Process

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy & Setup**](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Inputs:** Tines provides existing brand/persona docs, marketing materials, and a product demo.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Outputs:** GrowthX creates detailed artifacts to guide AI workflows:](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
          - [**Persona Deep Dives:** Nuanced profiles (fears, motivations, career drivers).](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
          - [**Writing Guidelines:** Style, tone, competitor references, and terminology.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
          - [**Topic Clusters:** SEO-driven assignments for building authority.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Content Generation Workflow**](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
      - [**Research:** Agentic workflow uses tools (EXA, Tavli) to create a research brief with sources and data points.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [**Drafting:** Agentic workflow uses the research brief and persona artifacts to generate a draft.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking:** A critical, multi-step process to prevent hallucinations:](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
        1.  [**Passage Extraction:** Article is split into passages.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
        2.  [**Deep Research:** Each passage is validated against a confidence interval.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
        3.  [**Rewrite Suggestions:** For low-confidence passages (e.g., opinion stated as fact), the AI suggests a more accurate rewrite.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [**Human Oversight:** GrowthX editors review every draft, using the platform to make edits and accept AI-suggested rewrites.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** An agentic workflow automatically finds and adds relevant internal links to new content.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
      - [**Client Review:** Tines gets two rounds of feedback per article before publication.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Tines's Evaluation & Timeline

  - [**Positive Assessment:** Tines is highly impressed with the process, especially the deep persona context and robust fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**Cost-Benefit Analysis:** Mark Hatton noted the \~$1,000/post cost is competitive with freelancers but offers far greater velocity and expertise, making it a strong value proposition.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Tines is targeting a late Q1 2026 kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Internal projects and a March company kickoff limit team capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
      - [**Impact:** A later start date is easier for GrowthX to reserve, as demand is high.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas (GrowthX):** Send follow-up email with meeting summary.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [**Mark Hatton (Tines):** Discuss the proposal with their manager and other stakeholders (content, product marketing).](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [**Both Teams:** Reconnect in a week to discuss progress and answer any new questions.](https://fathom.video/share/aSMy-FiKHkUfA4D-svtrSJWnYxDE78p1?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
